description: Agent-first onboarding to Smarter Weather: plans, docs, signup, API keys, MCP config, billing.
name: io.github.smarterweather/onboarding

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'required' to opt into OAuth 2.1 + PKCE sign-in and unlock account-scoped tools (API key minting, usage, billing). Unset, the bridge serves the anonymous discovery tools (get_plans, get_documentation, sign_up) with no credentials at all.
environmentVariables.name: SMARTERWEATHER_ONBOARDING_AUTH

environmentVariables.description: Override the target MCP endpoint for development or staging. Precedence: positional argument > SMARTERWEATHER_ONBOARDING_MCP_URL > package default.
environmentVariables.name: SMARTERWEATHER_ONBOARDING_MCP_URL

title: Smarter Weather Developer Onboarding
